promotions.name: $10 Burger & Brew
promotions.description: Swing by the Eugene Emeralds' $10 Burger & Brew Night, sponsored by Carl's Jr., where you can enjoy the best deal in town: a delicious burger and a cold beer for just $10! Don't miss out on the tastiest Tuesday tradition at every home series this season!

promotions.name: Mickey Mouse & Friends Night
promotions.description:
Join the Eugene Emeralds for Mickey & Friends Night, a magical evening filled with Disney fun for the whole family! The team will take the field in special Mickey Mouse jerseys, auctioned off to benefit the Emeralds Community Fund.
Enjoy a stadium-wide Disney sing-along, a Goofy Laugh contest, Hot Diggity Dog dance-off, and themed food and drinks that'll have you saying, "Oh boy!" all night long!

promotions.name: Wild Weenie Wednesday
promotions.description: Get ready for Wild Weenie Wednesdays, where $2 hot dogs are just the beginning! Sponsored by Kiefer Mazda, KMTR, and Nathan's Hot Dogs, enjoy themed games, chaos on AND off the field, and a night of outrageous fun as hot dogs take over the ballpark in the wackiest promotion of the season!

promotions.name: Car Giveaway!
promotions.description: Get ready for a chance to drive away in a new car during the Eugene Emeralds' Car Giveaway Nights, sponsored by Kiefer Mazda! One lucky fan, randomly selected, will win a set of wheels at each of the three giveaways on 7/2, 7/30, and 9/3 - don't miss your shot at this incredible prize!

linescore.note: One out when winning run scored.

promotions.name: Red White & Boom!
promotions.description: Get ready for a star-spangled night at the Eugene Emeralds 3rd of July Fireworks Celebration - Red, White, & BOOM! Celebrate baseball, America, and all things patriotic with a thrilling game, special Independence Day 59FIFTY Caps, and a breathtaking fireworks display. It's an unforgettable evening filled with fun, music, and a dazzling show that will light up the night sky!

promotions.name: Fourth of July Celebration
promotions.description: Kick off America's birthday the right way with America's favorite pastime, a Budweiser block party, and the best fireworks show in town all part of a very Hopped Up All-American Weekend.

promotions.name: Fireworks Friday
promotions.description: Friday games always end with a bang at Hillsboro Ballpark! Join the Hops for the best pairing, baseball and fireworks!

promotions.name: 5th of July Fest - Fireworks Saturday
promotions.description: We couldn't fit all the fun into one night, so we're lighting up the sky again! Join us for a second round of fireworks and another Budweiser Block Party on July 5th as part of our All-American Weekend celebration.

promotions.name: Salute to Service
promotions.description: Join us as we honor the brave men and women who serve and have served in our armed forces. We're proud to recognize local military members and veterans with special in-game tributes, patriotic festivities, and a heartfelt display of gratitude from the entire Hillsboro community. Active Duty, Reserve, and Veterans receive $3 off your tickets when purchased in person. Tickets can be purchased at the box office day of or at the Hops Front Office. (ID Required)

promotions.name: Kids Run the Bases
promotions.description: Round the bases and race your friends! Every Saturday and Sunday kids(12 and under) get to run the bases.

promotions.description:
Dust those boots off and get
ready for some foot stomping,
yee-haw type of fun at
Hillsboro Ballpark. To both
our baseball and rodeo
enthusiasts get ready to enjoy
some live country music,
line dancing and lots of fun!

venue.name: Rogers Field at Nat Bailey Stadium

promotions.name: Soñadores Luchadores
promotions.description: Step into the ring with Los Soñadores! Sign your kids up for a pregame lucha libre clinic and meet the luchadores. Enjoy a lucha libre exhibition, autograph signing, and the chance to win an authentic luchador mask!
promotions.presentedBy: Unitus Community Credit Union and Toyota

promotions.name: Fireworks Friday
promotions.description: Friday games always end with a bang at Hillsboro Ballpark! Join the Hops for the best pairing, baseball and fireworks!

venue.name: Rogers Field at Nat Bailey Stadium

promotions.name: Marvel's Defenders of the Diamond Night
promotions.description: Avengers, assemble! Join the Hops and your favorite Marvel Superheroes for Marvel's Defenders of the Diamond Night. Come dressed as your favorite Marvel character and enjoy a jam-packed night full of fun! Don't miss out on this epic night, smash into unforgettable memories.

promotions.name: Kids Run the Bases
promotions.description: Round the bases and race your friends! Every Saturday and Sunday kids(12 and under) get to run the bases.

promotions.name: Hops x X-Men Comic Book Giveaway
promotions.description: Make sure to arrive early and snag your Hops x X-Men inspired comic books! *while supplies last

venue.name: Rogers Field at Nat Bailey Stadium

promotions.name: Healthy Hillsboro Night
promotions.description: Join us for Healthy Hillsboro Night with special in-game activations to learn more about staying healthy!

promotions.name: Croc Charm Giveaway
promotions.description: Kick on those crocs and get out to Hillsboro Ballpark for exclusive Hops charm giveaways (Youth giveaway only). Snag your second of three charms tonight! The second charm is a Go Hops pennant.

promotions.name: Kids Run the Bases
promotions.description: Round the bases and race your friends! Every Saturday and Sunday kids(12 and under) get to run the bases.

promotions.name: Funko Friday #08:  Teal T-Shirt Item
promotions.description: A Funko Field tradition since 2019.   Every Friday regular season home game is a Funko Friday giveaway night!  Fans will receive a mystery Funko item.

promotions.name: Washington State University Alumni Night
promotions.description: The AquaSox welcome Cougar alumni to come join us for our annual WSU Alumni Night at Funko Field.   Show your pride and save yourself a drive to Pullman! Watch for special alumni ticket links and promos.

promotions.name: Brewfest (Game Ticket + Event Entrance)
promotions.description: Our annual Brewfest was created to share some of the beers we love with our AquaSox friends and fans!  By purchasing a limited ticket, you will be able to sample and enjoy some local craft breweries.
promotions.presentedBy: The Flying Pig / Mac & Jacks Brewing

promotions.name: Brewfest (Event Entrance Only)
promotions.description: For those that already have game tickets but still want to enjoy our Brewfest.
promotions.presentedBy: The Flying Pig / Mac & Jacks Brewing

promotions.name: Julio Rodriguez Bobble Trading Card Giveaway
promotions.description: Is it a bobblehead or is it a card?   Actually it's both.   In order to accommodate as many fans as possible it is one per person not one per ticket.

promotions.name: University of Washington  - Bothell Alumni Night
promotions.description: Show your Husky Pride and join us for UofW Alumni Night at Funko Field!  Watch for special alumni ticket links and promos.

promotions.name: Post-Game Fireworks #09
promotions.description: The fun continues after the game with a Post-Game Fireworks Extravaganza!  Watch us light up the Everett sky throughout the season with a fireworks show set to music.

promotions.name: Signature Sunday
promotions.description: Every Sunday from 3:00 to 3:30 we will have a pair of players signing autographs on the concourse outside of the Frog Shot.

promotions.name: Bluey at the Ballpark
promotions.description:
Your favorite character will be available for fans to meet and take photos with throughout the night.

Want to skip the line and guarantee a lovable, huggable Bluey. 

Early Access VIP Meet & Greet! We will have a special ticket promotion coming soon.

promotions.name: Bluey at the Ballpark (Add-On)
promotions.description: Got tickets to the game but still want the VIP Meet & Greet special?  Click here to purchase the add-on

promotions.name: Kids Run The Bases
promotions.description: Meet at the first base gate 10 minutes after the game ends.  Kids are allowed on the field after all players have exited.

promotions.name: 2025 Collectible Beer Stein Giveaway
promotions.description: While Supplies Last

promotions.name: Pride Night
promotions.description: Join us for a celebration of love, inclusivity, and equality at Pride Night! The evening will feature an exciting performance by CheerPDX, bringing vibrant entertainment and celebrating the LGBTQ+ community. Throughout the evening, connect with cultural resources, celebrate diversity, and embrace the spirit of unity that strengthens our community.

promotions.name: Christmas in July
promotions.description: Ho Ho Ho, Santa Claus is coming to town early! Ring in the holidays and celebrate Christmas in July with the Hops. Get your pictures with Santa, take in some Christmas caroling and enjoy the holliest, jolliest, Hoppiest baseball in town.

promotions.name: Fireworks Friday
promotions.description: Friday games always end with a bang at Hillsboro Ballpark! Join the Hops for the best pairing, baseball and fireworks!

promotions.name: Local Heroes Night
promotions.description: Join us for Local Heroes Night, celebrating first responders, frontline workers, and everyday champions. We will have special guests and activities to honor all that these individuals do for our community. It's a night of gratitude, baseball, and honoring the people who make our city strong. Bring the whole family out and be part of the celebration. Police, Fire, and Medical Responders receive $3 off your tickets when purchased in person. Tickets can be purchased at the box office day of or at the Hops Front Office. (ID Required)

promotions.name: Kids Run the Bases
promotions.description: Round the bases and race your friends! Every Saturday and Sunday kids(12 and under) get to run the bases.

promotions.name: Kids Run the Bases
promotions.description: Round the bases and race your friends! Every Saturday and Sunday kids(12 and under) get to run the bases.

promotions.name: Friendship Bracelet Day
promotions.description: Whether you're 22 or 102 this game is sure to be a hit! Join us, at the ballpark on the westside, for a Sunday afternoon game celebrating our Friendship Era!

promotions.name: SCRAPS Bark in the Park Night
promotions.description: Enjoy a baseball game alongside your furry friend! Fans and dogs alike will receive the special group rate of $6.00 + fees per ticket. Fans that bring their dogs will get to sit in a special pet-friendly section and all proceeds from dog tickets will be donated to local animal shelters. Stick around after the game to join the SCRAPS Puppy Parade and receive a specialty dog giveaway item courtesy of SCRAPS!

promotions.name: Dollars In Your Dog & Youth Sports Night
promotions.description: Calling all Youth Sports Athletes! Wear your team jersey with pride and join us as we celebrate all local youth sports groups in the Eastern WA & Northern ID area. Also, fans can buy a hot dog and look inside the wrapper for your chance to win cash. A total of $2,000 will be available to win! Plus, kids 12 & under can stay tuned after the game for Dairy Queen Circle the Bases!

promotions.name: Malmö Oat Milkers & Lawton Team Photo Giveaway
promotions.description: Did someone say dynasty? Your other home team is back from their astonishingly successful first season to make even more history in what could be this year's most unforgettable game, including fun like VIP seats, a crazy first pitch, Oat Milker Fan Trivia, the chance to sign an Oat Milkers contract and more! Also, all fans in attendance will receive a 2025 Spokane Indians Team Photo courtesy of Lawton Printing.
